error_signature: Failed to connect to MCP server: MCP error -32001: Request timed out
title: MCP Server Timeout Error
symptom: The workflow fails with a timeout error on the second request after working fine initially. The error message indicates a failure to connect to the MCP server.
not_this_if: Error occurs only on the first request
root_cause: The timeout error occurs when the MCP server is unable to handle the requests due to insufficient resources, such as low memory or CPU allocation. This can lead to delays in processing requests, resulting in timeouts.
fix_steps: Ensure that the server has adequate CPU resources
Monitor the server performance to identify any memory leakages
agent_instruction: Increase the memory and CPU resources allocated to the MCP server.
